message:
fix(reactor/io_uring): add fcntl pre-flight check to modify() for early stale-fd pruning

The modify() method could attempt to submit a poll_add SQE for an already-
closed fd, only discovering the error deep in the kernel submission path.
Add an early fcntl(F_GETFD) validity check at the top of modify() that
detects closed fds before any SQE work begins. If the fd is invalid, the
stale registration is pruned immediately and the error is returned.

This complements the existing rollback logic (which handles SQE submission
failures) by catching the most common failure case — a closed fd — before
any kernel interaction, reducing wasted ring capacity and improving error
attribution in diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
